Risk Controls

                  
                

                
Filter trades that exceed slippage or liquidity thresholds. Set to 0 to disable.

                

                  

                    
Max Slippage %

                    
Bid-ask spread as % of mid price. Block trades above this threshold.

                    
                  

                  

                    
Min Volume (K shares/day)

                    
Minimum average daily volume in thousands. Block illiquid stocks.

                    
                  

                

                
Saved.

              


            


          

        

      


    


    
    


      
      

        

          

            
Caddy Status

            
—

          

        

        

          

            
Certificate

            
—

          

        

        

          

            
Expires In

            
—

          

        

        

          

            
Issuer

            
—

          

        

        

          

            
Auto-Renew

            
—

          

        

      


      
      

        

          Domain Configuration
          
        

        

          

            Caddy automatically obtains and renews a Let's Encrypt certificate for your domain.
            The domain must be publicly resolvable and ports 80/443 must be open.
          

          

            

              
              
            

            

              
              
            

            
          

          

        

      


      
      

        
Pipeline Encryption

        

          

            
          

          

            Redis and PostgreSQL run on the internal Podman network (10.89.0.0/24).
            Traffic never leaves the host — enabling TLS on these services is optional but
            can be done by passing TLS flags to Redis and sslmode=require to PostgreSQL.
          

        

      


      
      

        
Certificate Actions

        

          

            
            
              Caddy auto-renews 30 days before expiry. Use Force Renewal only if the cert is in an error state.
            
          

          


          

            
Quick Setup Guide

            
    
              
  1. Point your domain's A record to this server's public IP
    2. 
              
  2. Ensure ports 80 and 443 are open in your firewall
    3. 
              
  3. Enter the domain and contact email above and click Save & Apply
    4. 
              
  4. Start Caddy: podman-compose up -d caddy
    5. 
              
  5. Caddy will obtain the Let's Encrypt certificate automatically on first HTTPS request
    6. 
              
  6. The webui will be accessible at https://<your-domain>
    7.

            New Directive
            

          

        

        

          

            Enter a natural-language trade instruction. The Directive Agent will evaluate it
            against live market conditions every 5 minutes during trading hours and execute
            when conditions are met. Directives remain active until executed or cancelled.

          Order Latency
          

            
            
          

        

        

          
Loading…

        

      

    


    
    

      

        

          ⚠
          

            
Switch to Live Trading?

            
Real orders will be placed

          

        

        

          

          

          

            
⚠ This will enable real money trading

            
All configured live accounts will receive actual orders. Losses are real. Make sure your position sizing and risk limits are correctly configured before proceeding.

          

        

        

          
          
        

      

    


    
    

      

        

          ⚠
          

            
LIVE TRADING MODE — READ BEFORE CONTINUING

            
Acknowledge the risks to enable live trading

          

        

        

          
You are about to enable LIVE TRADING. From this point on, OpenTrader will be able to place real orders against real accounts using real money. Bugs, misconfiguration, and unexpected market conditions can — and do — cause losses, sometimes total.

          

            

              OpenTrader is provided AS-IS. There is:

                • NO warranty that it will work correctly

                • NO guarantee that any strategy will be profitable

                • NO support obligation from the authors or contributors

                • NO ability to reverse, recover, or compensate for losses
            

          

          
Before you continue, you must understand and accept that:

          
    
            
  1. You are solely responsible for every order this software places.
    2. 
            
  2. You have read the Risk Disclosure in full.
    3. 
            
  3. You have tested this exact configuration in paper-trading first.
    4. 
            
  4. You have set position-size limits, loss limits, and a kill switch.
    5. 
            
  5. You can afford to lose every dollar in the connected account.
    6. 
            
  6. The authors and contributors of OpenTrader bear no liability for any loss, damage, fee, tax, or other consequence of your trading.
    7. 
          

          

            
To continue, type the following phrase exactly (case-sensitive):

            
I understand the risks and accept full responsibility

              ? Vocabulary & Exclusions
              Available signal sources, reserved keywords, and your active exclusions
            

            ▼
          

          

            


              
              

                
Signal Sources

                

                  

                    ovtlyr
                    OVTLYR market scanner signals (long/short, confidence score)
                  

                  

                    wsb_sentiment
                    Reddit r/wallstreetbets mention velocity + sentiment
                  

                  

                    seekalpha_sentiment
                    SeekingAlpha article sentiment score
                  

                  

                    predictor
                    ML predictor score (0–1 directional confidence)
                  

                

              


              
              

                
Referencing Exclusions in Prompts

                

                  Your excluded sectors and tickers are automatically injected into every AI prompt — you don't need to repeat them. You can also reference them explicitly:
                

                

                  

                    "Build a momentum strategy — respect my sector and ticker exclusions"
                  

                  

                    "Suggest 5 tickers that fit this strategy, excluding my blocked sectors"
                  

                  

                    "Add entry rules using ovtlyr + wsb_sentiment combined"
                  

                

                
Manage exclusions in Configuration → User Settings

              


              
              

                

                  Your Active Exclusions
                  

                    

                      !
                    

                    

                      These exclusions are a User Preference set in the Configuration panel under User Settings. The AI strategy engineer automatically respects them in every prompt.
                    

                  

                

                

                  
Excluded Sectors

                  

                    None configured
                  

                

                

                  
Excluded Tickers

                  

                    None configured
                  

                

              


            


            
            

              
Risk Controls

              


                
                

                  

                    Max Slippage %
                  

                  

                    Blocks trades where the bid-ask spread exceeds a percentage of the mid price.

                    Formula: (ask − bid) / mid × 100

                    Typical values:
                    0.1–0.5% — large-cap equities
                    0.5–2% — mid/small-cap
                    0 — disabled (no filter)
                  

                


                
                

                  

                    Min Volume K
                  

                  

                    Blocks trades in stocks with insufficient average daily volume. Measured in thousands of shares (K).

                    Typical values:
                    500K+ — highly liquid large-caps
                    100–500K — standard equity strategies
                    50–100K — small-cap strategies
                    0 — disabled (no filter)
                  

                


                
                

                  
How it works

                  

                    Both controls are enforced before every order in the equity and options traders, immediately after the TradingView confirmation step. A blocked trade is logged but not counted as a rejection.
                  

                  

                    The strategy document supports per-strategy overrides via the Risk Controls block — the Strategy Engineer will suggest appropriate values for the target universe.
                  

                  
Configure in Configuration → User Settings → Risk Controls

              ✦ AI Strategy Assistant
              

                
                
                
              

            

            

              

                

                  Hi! I'm your AI strategy engineer. Tell me what kind of trading strategy you want to build — describe the asset class, market conditions you want to trade, any indicators or signals you have in mind, and your risk tolerance. I can pull live TradingView data for any ticker to help validate the approach.
